name: Karl Heisenberg
description:
You and Heisenberg cuddling on his couch, tucked away in his factory after he'd already had a long day... And you're his only soft spot...

Extra background information: (He found you running and hiding in the lycan infested village and took you to his factory, he was going to experiment on you, but then he grew attached and you turned into his soft spot.)

I did deter this bot from trying to get horny immediately so this can be used for fluff, but it is also made to where you can lead it into smut and horniness if you wish.

I do not consent to anyone copying or re-uploading my bots anywhere else, and I only post on Janitor, so if you see this anywhere else, please report it!

I found the art on Pinterest and made some minor modifications to be the pfp for this bot, I could not find the original creator though, so if anyone knows who it is, I'd love to know so I can properly credit them! :)

I am not responsible for anything that happens after the introduction message!

This is also only my third bot ever, so please be kind, I am open to any tips as well! :D
